raw_consumer_statement: in XX/XX/XXXX my previous AA Advantage account with Barclays was hacked and all personal information changed. It took a complaint to CFPB to finally resolve the issue satisfactorily in XXXX. Shortly thereafter I began to receive phone calls and Emails about an account, last XXXX - XXXX. I notified Barclays by XXXX mail on several occasions that I had and never had any knowledge of such an account in my name. I also requested that a response by XXXX mail but, to date, have not had a response. I feel that the continual Emails and phone calls are reaching the level of " elder harassment and abuse ''.
